mechanics.excerpt: November of 3051_ the Clans renewed their Invasion January of 3052, Clans Smoke Jaguar and Nova Cat attacked the Combine capital Luthien: In an act of unexpected political courage that sealed the oose alliance between the Federated Commonwealth and the Draconis Combine Hanse Davion sent the Kell Hounds and Wolf's Dragoons help defend his age-old enemy = homeworld.
